specific_question: What percentage of Lee's Market's customers consistently rate us as "Very Satisfied" (CSAT 5/5) after a service interaction that was resolved in under 5 minutes?
answer: 65% of customers who had their issue resolved in under 5 minutes via chat or phone in 2025 rated the experience a 5/5 (Very Satisfied).
justification: This metric ties the high value of speed to the highest satisfaction tier, indicating that service improvements targeting resolution time will have a direct impact on our brand promoters.
dr_question: Considering companies achieve superior financial results by focusing on enhancing the experience of existing customers, what CS service improvements could be implemented by 2026 to make customers feel more recognized and valued during interactions?
